response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly matching the role. Demonstrates polyglot proficiency (TS, Java, Kotlin-adjacent JVM exposure via Java, Python not explicitly listed), MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong testing/TDD background. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, React depth at scale, Vitest, and PostgreSQL, but the breadth and craftsmanship orientation make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with current TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work directly aligned to the role
Strong testing and engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, workshops on testing)
Polyglot experience across JS/TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, plus Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; React experience mentioned only briefly
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
PostgreSQL not listed; database experience is primarily MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js, Vitest, and limited recent React depth
